Checklist Item: Skip links implemented
Lighthouse accessibility score >= 90 in Browser Audit Lighthouse panel; zero critical (wcag2a/wcag2aa) accessibility violations reported; all flagged items reviewed and addressed or documented
No inline scripts without nonce/hash (CSP compliant)
Form actions use HTTPS only
Comments: All form actions HTTPS or empty

Checklist Item: Lazy loading for below-the-fold images
CSS delivery optimized
Unused JS removed
Meta description tag present on all pages; content between 50-160 characters; not a default placeholder value (e.g. 'description' / 'website' / 'page')
Favicon (<link rel="icon">) present in <head>; Apple touch icon present where applicable
Canonical URL (<link rel="canonical">) present on all indexable pages; href is absolute URL; no duplicate canonical tags per page
Alternate language annotations (hreflang) present for multilingual sites; each hreflang is valid BCP 47 tag; x-default fallback present
CSS <link> and <style> tags appear before <script> tags in <head> section; no JavaScript-only <script> inserted before stylesheet <link>
Comments: Head order: script, script, script, script, title, link, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta, meta

Checklist Item: External links with target="_blank" include rel="noopener noreferrer" to prevent tab nabbing and referrer leakage
Custom error pages for 404 and 5xx HTTP responses exist in source; error pages include site branding and navigation back to homepage
Comments: 404/5xx error pages require separate URL checks; not verified on homepage

Checklist Item: Webfont files use WOFF2 as primary format with WOFF fallback; @font-face declarations include format() hints matching served file types
Lighthouse performance score >= 90 on desktop and >= 90 on mobile; run via Browser Audit Lighthouse panel (Audits tab) with device and throttling set appropriately

LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) < 2.5s; CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) < 0.1; INP (Interaction to Next Paint) < 200ms; verify via Browser Audit Performance panel recording or Lighthouse Core Web Vitals section

No JavaScript long tasks (> 50ms) blocking the main thread during page load; Total Blocking Time (TBT) within budget; verify via Browser Audit Performance panel Main thread flame chart and Lighthouse TBT metric
Time to First Byte (TTFB) < 800ms measured in Browser Audit Network panel Timing tab; no excessive DNS lookup or TCP/TLS connection time in waterfall
Lighthouse SEO score >= 90 and Best Practices score >= 90 in Browser Audit Lighthouse panel; no critical findings blocking either category
Total page weight within performance budget (< 1MB transferred for initial load); verify via Browser Audit Network panel Summary row showing transferred size, resource count, and finish time
Text resources (HTML/CSS/JS) served with gzip or Brotli compression; verify via Content-Encoding response header in Browser Audit Network panel Headers tab for each critical resource

All images within size budget; no uncompressed PNG served where WebP/AVIF is available; image display dimensions match intrinsic dimensions (no oversized images scaled via CSS); verify in Browser Audit Network panel and Lighthouse image audit
Resources served over HTTP/2 or HTTP/3 protocol; verify via Protocol column in Browser Audit Network panel (right-click column headers to enable Protocol column)
Comments: Protocol column requires DevTools Network panel; not captured in automated run

Checklist Item: JavaScript and CSS coverage on critical pages shows < 50% unused bytes on initial load; verify via Browser Audit Coverage panel (Ctrl+Shift+P > Show Coverage); flag unused bytes for lazy loading or removal
Comments: Coverage panel requires manual DevTools; not automatable headless

Checklist Item: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) response header present with restrictive policy; no 'unsafe-inline' or 'unsafe-eval' directives without nonce/hash; verify in Browser Audit Network panel Response Headers for the main document request

X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff present on all responses; X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors set to prevent clickjacking; Referrer-Policy header configured to restrict referrer leakage; verify all security headers in Browser Audit Network panel

Zero JavaScript errors or unhandled promise rejections in Browser Audit Console panel on page load and during core user interactions; no CORS policy errors; console filter set to Errors level during production audit
No deprecated browser API usage warnings or browser compatibility warnings visible in Browser Audit Console panel on production URL; Verbose level checked for hidden debug output
No mixed content warnings in Browser Audit Security panel; all sub-resources (scripts/styles/images/fonts/iframes) loaded over HTTPS; Security panel reports 'This page is secure (valid HTTPS)'
TLS certificate valid and not expired; certificate chain complete and trusted by browser; verify in Browser Audit Security panel Certificate section; no certificate warnings on page load
Comments: Loaded over HTTPS without certificate errors

Checklist Item: No sensitive data (auth tokens; PII; credentials; session secrets) visible in Browser Audit Application panel under Local Storage; Session Storage; IndexedDB; or Cookies; HttpOnly and Secure flags set on authentication cookies

Cookies used for session management have SameSite attribute set to Strict or Lax; Secure flag enforced on all auth cookies; no unencrypted sensitive values in cookie payloads; verify in Browser Audit Application > Storage > Cookies

Page layout tested at standard breakpoints using Browser Audit Device Toolbar responsive mode: 320px; 375px; 768px; 1024px; 1440px; no horizontal scrollbar at any mobile width; no content overflow or clipping detected
Comments: No horizontal overflow at tested breakpoints

Checklist Item: CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) < 0.1 verified in Browser Audit Performance panel recording; no unexpected layout shifts after fonts load or lazy-loaded images render; individual shift scores inspected in Experience section of timeline

No render-blocking resources identified in Browser Audit Lighthouse report or Performance panel waterfall; third-party scripts do not appear in critical rendering path; async/defer attributes confirmed in Network timeline
No console.log or developer debug output active on production build; Browser Audit Console panel shows zero developer messages at Verbose/Info level when auditing production URL

No 'Violation' messages (handler took Xms; forced reflow while executing) in Browser Audit Console panel during user interactions; violations indicate long-running event handlers or layout thrashing caused by interleaved DOM reads and writes

No forced synchronous layouts (layout thrashing) visible in Browser Audit Performance panel flame chart; purple 'Recalculate Style' or 'Layout' blocks triggered inside JS call stacks flagged; scrolling and animation frames remain within 16ms budget
Comments: Requires Performance flame chart; not fully automatable headless

Checklist Item: No excessive repaints on scroll or CSS transitions; verify via Browser Audit Rendering panel > Paint flashing checkbox; green flash areas should be minimal and not cover full-page regions on scroll

No detached DOM nodes accumulating after component mount/unmount cycles or SPA route changes; verify via Browser Audit Memory panel > Take heap snapshot > filter by 'Detached'; zero detached HTMLElement nodes expected after GC

Preloaded resources (<link rel='preload'>) are consumed within the page load; no 'The resource was preloaded using link preload but not used within a few seconds' warnings in Browser Audit Console; unused preloads waste bandwidth and block the load event

Web fonts load without FOIT (Flash of Invisible Text); Performance panel film strip shows text visible during font load phase; font-display swap or optional strategy confirmed by absence of blank text frames in Network waterfall timing

FCP (First Contentful Paint) < 1.8s and Speed Index < 3.4s on mobile throttled network; verify via Browser Audit Lighthouse panel or Performance panel timing markers; FCP marker visible in Network waterfall as vertical line

No duplicate network requests for the same resource during page load; verify via Browser Audit Network panel sorted by Name column; duplicate URL entries indicate missing request deduplication or redundant script imports

WebSocket connections (if used) use encrypted wss:// protocol only; no unencrypted ws:// connections visible in Browser Audit Network panel WS filter; sensitive data must not transit over unencrypted WebSocket channels

No resources loaded from origins not listed in Content-Security-Policy; CSP violations visible in Browser Audit Console as 'Refused to load' messages; each violation indicates a policy misconfiguration or an unauthorized resource
